description: Log in to Moodle (http://localhost/moodle) as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!). In the course "Introduction to Physics" (PHYS101), update the first five sections to match the new curriculum. Section 1: "Unit 1: Classical Mechanics" (Summary: "Newton's laws of motion, kinematics, and dynamics"). Section 2: "Unit 2: Thermodynamics" (Summary: "Heat, energy, and the laws of thermodynamics"). Section 3: "Unit 3: Waves and Optics" (Summary: "Wave phenomena, light, and optical instruments"). Section 4: "Unit 4: Electricity and Magnetism" (Summary: "Electric fields, circuits, and electromagnetic induction"). Section 5: "Unit 5: Final Exam Review" (Summary: "Comprehensive review materials and practice problems"), hidden from students.
